# WebAct

> WebAct provides professional website design, SEO, AEO, digital advertising, branding, local marketing, website support, and industry-focused website solutions.

## Primary pages

- [Homepage](https://www.webact.com/)
- [Website Design](https://www.webact.com/design/index.html)
- [Digital Marketing](https://www.webact.com/marketing/index.html)
- [Digital Advertising](https://www.webact.com/digital-ads/index.html)
- [Industries](https://www.webact.com/industries/index.html)
- [Portfolio](https://www.webact.com/about/portfolio.html)
- [Pricing](https://www.webact.com/pricing/index.html)
- [About WebAct](https://www.webact.com/about/index.html)
- [Contact WebAct](https://www.webact.com/contact/index.html)

## Crawling guidance

- Public service, industry, portfolio, pricing, and company pages may be crawled.
- Respect robots.txt and page-level robots directives.
- Prefer canonical URLs on www.webact.com.
- Do not treat audit reports, backups, or development files as public content.

- Website: https://www.webact.com/
